repo_notes:
Auto Servis is a Python/Flask web application for managing a car-repair workshop (auto-mechanic service). It is designed to run on a Raspberry Pi Zero 2W (as a systemd service) or Windows (for development). The interface language is Serbian (Latin script).

Stack: Flask 3.0, Flask-SQLAlchemy (SQLite backend), Flask-Login, Flask-WTF (CSRF), Waitress (production WSGI), APScheduler (background journal e-mailing), xhtml2pdf + ReportLab (PDF generation), Pillow (image handling), python-dotenv. Frontend: Bootstrap 5, Chart.js, custom JS (analytics, service form, dark theme toggle).

Key features:
- Two user roles: admin and radnik (worker). First registered user becomes admin.
- Admin sees all services/prices; workers see only their own work.
- Cars tracked by license plate: owner, mileage, photo, brand/model/engine/fuel/year.
- Service records: parts table (retail price, discounted/cost price, quantity), labor price/description, date, profit calculation.
- Plate-first service flow: enter plate → if car exists, add service; if not, register car first.
- Mileage auto-updated from most recent service reading.
- Printing: customer copy (no labor, retail prices) and owner copy (all prices, profit). Single service or all services for a car. HTML print + PDF export.
- Journals: daily/weekly/monthly, per worker or shop-wide. E-mail sending via SMTP.
- Analytics: profit/parts analysis with Chart.js charts (revenue/profit over time, revenue structure, parts price comparison, profit per worker).
- Company setup: name, address, contact, logo (admin only).
- Backup: consistent SQLite snapshot + uploads zipped; admin UI + CLI + scheduled.
- Security: CSRF protection, login throttling (IP-based), session-based auth, security headers (CSP, X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options), admin_required decorator, deactivated user ejection.
- Dark/light theme toggle (localStorage-persisted).

Layout:
- app/ — Flask package (factory in __init__.py, config.py, extensions.py, models.py, security.py, auth.py, main.py, cars.py, services.py, reports.py, printing.py, pdf.py, email_utils.py, scheduler.py, utils.py, templates/, static/)
- Root scripts: serve.py (Waitress production), run.py (Flask dev), init_db.py (schema + demo seed), backup.py (CLI backup)
- deploy/ — systemd unit file for Raspberry Pi
- requirements.txt — pinned dependencies

Data model: User, Company (single-row), Car, Service, Part. Service.total_full = labor + parts(retail). Service.total_profit = labor + (parts retail - parts cost). Relationships: User→Services, Car→Services (cascade delete), Service→Parts (cascade delete).

Entrypoints: serve.py (production), run.py (development), init_db.py (DB setup), backup.py (CLI backup).

pages.title: Overview
pages.purpose: High-level description of Auto Servis: what it is, tech stack, project layout, how parts fit together, and how to get started.

pages.title: Application Factory
pages.purpose: How create_app() in __init__.py wires extensions, blueprints, middleware, error handlers, Jinja helpers, security headers, and the optional scheduler.

pages.title: Configuration
pages.purpose: All settings in config.py: database, uploads, SMTP, security, scheduler, environment variable overrides via .env.

pages.title: Data Models
pages.purpose: The five SQLAlchemy models (User, Company, Car, Service, Part), their columns, relationships, and derived price/profit properties.

pages.title: Authentication & Users
pages.purpose: Login, registration, login throttling, role management (admin/worker), user creation, toggle active/role — the auth blueprint.

pages.title: Dashboard & Setup
pages.purpose: The main blueprint: dashboard with today/month stats and recent services; company setup (name, address, logo).

pages.title: Car Management
pages.purpose: Car registration, listing (search by plate/owner/brand), detail view, editing — the cars blueprint.

pages.title: Service Records
pages.purpose: The plate-first service flow, creating/editing/deleting services, parts management, mileage recomputation, listing — the services blueprint.

pages.title: Reports & Analytics
pages.purpose: Journals (daily/weekly/monthly), per-worker and shop-wide summaries, profit analytics with Chart.js, e-mail sending of journals.

pages.title: Printing & PDF Export
pages.purpose: Customer and owner print copies (HTML print dialog + PDF download via xhtml2pdf), single service or all services for a car.

pages.title: Backup System
pages.purpose: Consistent SQLite snapshot + uploads zip, admin UI, CLI script, scheduled automatic backups, pruning.

pages.title: Utilities
pages.purpose: Helper functions: Serbian currency/date formatting, image upload with Pillow resizing, period range calculation.

pages.title: Background Scheduler
pages.purpose: APScheduler integration: automatic daily/weekly/monthly journal e-mailing and nightly backups.

pages.title: Frontend Assets
pages.purpose: Bootstrap 5 UI, Chart.js analytics charts, service form JS (live part-row management and totals), dark/light theme toggle.

pages.title: Security Architecture
pages.purpose: Cross-cutting security: CSRF protection, login throttling, admin_required decorator, security headers, session hardening, deactivated-user ejection.

pages.title: Pricing & Profit Model
pages.purpose: How retail/discounted prices, labor, and profit are calculated end-to-end across Part, Service, reports, and printing.

pages.title: Deployment
pages.purpose: Production deployment on Raspberry Pi (systemd + Waitress), Windows quick start, init_db.py seeding, .env configuration.
